SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  
"An innocent person would likely feel betrayed and confused, questioning the fairness of the legal system."  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the conversation with a sense of urgency, ensuring clarity and empathy. Wrap up by emphasizing the importance of justice and fairness. Silver-tongued responses can be effective in such scenarios. A sir may offer guidance or support."  
"The stranger approached with a concerned expression, offering a moment of reflection. He wrapped his arms around the person, showing solidarity."
